title: Workflows
description: Detailed step-by-step logic for the primary system workflows. See child documents for detailed documentation.

index.title: Document Ingestion
index.summary: 13-step pipeline for turning raw files into searchable vectors. Includes 5-stage retrieval pipeline.
key_rules: Redis Bloom Filter for O(1) duplicate detection
Upload returns 202 immediately (async processing)
Contextualizer prepends document-level summary to every chunk
Hybrid indexing: dense (1024-dim) + sparse (BM25)

index.title: Chat → Retrieve → Generate → Response
index.summary: 5-layer cache architecture + 5-stage retrieval with Neighbor Expansion (Soi sáng).
key_rules: SemanticCache (Redis Vector) for similarity > 98%
LLM Response Cache bypasses LLM API entirely
4-layer thinking suppression for Gemma 4
Sliding Window rate limiting: 30 req/min per user

index.title: Hard Delete
index.summary: 6-step hard-delete order (STRICT). Sections before DB row for referential integrity.
key_rules: registry.delete() → vectors → sections → file → DB row → purge
Sections deleted BEFORE DB row
Redis Registry marks deleted immediately
Qdrant vectors removed before PostgreSQL

index.title: Decoupled Audit Logging
index.summary: Fire-and-forget logging via Redis Stream. Never blocks API response.
key_rules: API never writes to SecurityAudit table directly
XADD to Redis Stream returns in < 1ms
AuditStreamWorker batches every 5-10s
Redis Stream provides durability until DB ready

index.title: Analytics Data Flow
index.summary: Token tracking per message, aggregated by user. Admin sees system-wide, member sees own.
key_rules: tokens_in, tokens_out, latency_ms stored per ChatMessage
estimated_cost_usd calculated from configurable pricing
Admin sees system-wide stats, member sees own only
Rate limited: 60/min per user

error_handling.handling: Trips to OPEN if Qdrant/GPU fails repeatedly, prevents loop hanging
Redis Mutex prevents race conditions during session hydration
Sliding window protects AI resources from abuse
